subject: [Gemini API] Build multimodal RAG with new Gemini Embedding
body:

online<https://notifications.google.com/g/vib/AEJ26qvKbaYNsIqCjdxxyZSErJ_8NGtobaq6kQZfyOpHFJSywq7zl_JP87LWwacl0l_PK728QOZwc-a50EQfRgILAPJpKfZR_Ds8peqoSuGGzAiOwhAa5iYx-EENlaZe3-C6Yw8>

Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AEJ26qu_Xxpgq6rBeaYEeXUcL8p4ISntcM4XlTLebqeRyQWXBSqmA2CYon2CPXX1dyP96AFRmKZMGAjk-bd2yhsgxHtW9e5TUfcrSSaS3DZcWGVUMiCO8DzdHUK8kMiCSaeA3JOxVfUafgn9vWI6zQ>

New multimodal Gemini Embedding model 🚀

Try in Gemini  
API<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvbrvwVtmEJOX-oJLiX0q4WkDKgIKpaUshmxtUzyiHm42xM30pUW1_b04EiIbO52JZFMoPDxL2I41I4EWn-m_QRB3vmRdGDVP5th5W3BNI5-N6XGFukS5W1QanalZq1CjxNCGqcHW6nyMLKmq2CQuqfEB7rvFnACNiU7Y3CvbjqM5LA75uj1Q>

Hi Denys,

We just launched Gemini Embedding 2 in the Gemini API with a new multimodal  
input to make it easier to build advanced RAG and semantic search systems.  
It now natively maps text, image, video, audio, and PDF inputs into a  
single, unified embedding space.

Why you'll like multimodal embeddings

- Simplified tech  
stack<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvEb2P3rqhfCHB1rX3KvWPwQSq1wtTc0dSA0RIHF0V-ek7KK-UbE3jWzwbp-1TFn6iNJyPr7LcYTESq59clyYHGZfvXxqdeGX2kLW7ntTSJ3iqTp46w9mwPpnL7WNpEYdx21dL_Pv_WmOnFGsEPje5XSj1HquKU2-8_051opvRqFWskSuo>:  
Replace multiple models with one that processes multimodal content natively.
- Multimodal  
RAG<https://c.gle/AEJ26qsGpVl5dhG60qA7nLJM3c0ZGRG7UO1HVxhZG1frTMIKeOB_bLAsIk2FYrxqBByOrp44PxOnNx27LbNd4U-gADtjaPj2XXj91e_upIzy8AZMsW9Ac2jDEEoe_0ERxf-DEkbKirVDGVbfNnv3pNDrqphpSIdoA1RFx3jPCktDeIuCbGV2gg>:  
Improve accuracy and performance by retrieving information from different  
file types simultaneously.
- Cross-modal  
search<https://c.gle/AEJ26qtNdDGAFe3ivzr2UymRoL8kjNcbP31ARe5FuhMp4UHsA7VBZSpUv3IDYjBeD8LrSw05-7fOUL6jZDlhk9gLvzx1NEEcZykagDUhb0Yg1Djkve-LatNqgz8VhJ-ipkKPApDqtZhFd-J0JN1rCpDjiVgKmxXR3zaI3U4Byo5ElDWAIcc>:  
Match a text query to a relevant image, video clip, or audio segment, all  
in one index.

Get started in minutes

Start using the newest embeddings with this embed_content method:

from google import genai

from google.genai import types

client = genai.Client()

with open("example.png", "rb") as f:

image_bytes = f.read()

with open("sample.mp3", "rb") as f:

audio_bytes = f.read()

# Here we embed text, image, and audio

result = client.models.embed_content(

model="gemini-embedding-2-preview",

contents=[

"What is the meaning of life?",

types.Part.from_bytes(

data=image_bytes,

mime_type="image/png",

),

types.Part.from_bytes(

data=audio_bytes,

mime_type="audio/mpeg",

),

],

)

print(result.embeddings)

As you take embeddings to production, it is common to use vector databases  
such as Vertex  
AI<https://c.gle/AEJ26qt1R69hkeIEj7Tm-RGP1ExeiOKiMv5fNy442OMsV6vng1jEzYZgqhMV3hJfkp0a93LtD0rY4P9eR2u1np9h-X7bbLQ7bcHWr9J_ljgHDB2Y4Cu5ZT0A5BVPso_dvUGyQcylMxcMmLWR8q-GiQ>,  
Weaviate<https://c.gle/AEJ26qu2Fto5NHvltqtf7AbOokVxzHOyhMUoFqzCW9hpPRygShYqM5p6jAK2Bf4GiWgNAs1tsm73hhCfF7WF-L7KbflkjdqK4odklYGCwq5Ub57O-TkkmFipZIGm9AfllOUqwmQY_6-kRwxeNqFckECPCvFTtHU9QB136f2UO5dOIH44OBg>,  
Qdrant<https://c.gle/AEJ26qtLYzEX_S0hrKEOc4a17gdznj9iYRbHpkRgYBzKeAaRMfeZD173fhjJGBGztADGZkOBoNzdohhu6DMHXFsKgdWUa7Zyyhgm2_SfOS7xdRYHLGYleNrAo9eACLg763MRFDmylylSuLrFbaTz6QA6RZYKMn6TVKngxBukYks>,  
and  
ChromaDB<https://c.gle/AEJ26quylIi_dX0XcOw5WXc7HpIwQgjDctXp6d7kGN3wCPwlgwg_rWiTaVWS9mStH8h1hlW87zP0yAjS_dhNUjH4YQZY-awM1PdujlTtDb23a_IREHA37FnTXIa8Fse8uH2wkr-pj42BNv_4Ktl2Gqu6V_8HMMxlH182u7n_UAEvqySrHEdu2CMER5CLdyNUBevMfQ>  
to efficiently store, index, and retrieve high-dimensional embeddings.

Happy building,

The Google AI Studio team
